title: commiphora neglecta
intro: Commiphora neglecta is a species of flowering plant in the myrrh family, Burseraceae, native to Somalia and Ethiopia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Commiphora neglecta include wound healing, anti-arthritic properties, and antimicrobial effects against certain bacteria and fungi. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal remedies such as essential oils, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to address various health issues.
